positive: A delicate, hyper-detailed watercolor illustration of various exotic tropical flowers (hibiscus, bird of paradise, orchids) intertwined with lush jungle foliage. Soft pastel color palette, highly rendered, botanical art style, watercolor texture, perfect for screen printing.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, digital painting, photorealism
